subcodes.title: Words to Stanwood Cobb in Jan. 1908
subcodes.first_line: One might say, 'Well, I will endure such-and-such a person so long as he is endurable.' But Bahá'ís must endure people even when they are unendurable.
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
